prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合近两年位次加速后移趋势、2026年小幅缩招（2人）、学校 声誉负面事件、工科专业热度持续等因素，预计2026年物理类竞争仍将加剧但幅度收窄；在，结合位次后移惯性及声誉抑制效应，预测最低位次约39 00名，区间3455–4345名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2542 → 2475 → 2514 → 3110 → 3917, with a clear backward shift in the last two years. In 2024, it shifted back by about 600 places compared to 2023, and in 2025, it shifted back by about 800 places compared to 2024, showing an accelerating trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3917. From 2021 to 2023, the science enrollment plan was 80/80/83 students, and from 2024 to 2025, the Physics Category plan was 83/83 students. The 2026 plan is 81 students, a decrease of 2 students from 2025, a slight reduction of about 2.4%, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 20th from 2021 to 2023, 21st in 2024, 23rd in 2025, and is expected to rise back to 21st in 2026, firmly in the national top tier. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is 'clearly negative,' involving academic misconduct incidents such as data fabrication by the dean of the School of Life Sciences and multiple teachers being publicly reported, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 36th (relatively hot), with moderate to high overall exposure. In 2022, there was a signal of a cutoff drop in Henan. It has 14 A-/A/A+ disciplines including Chemistry A+, Mathematics A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Statistics A, Physics A, Biology A, Marxist Theory A, World History A, Chinese History A, Chinese Language and Literature A, and Political Science A, with balanced arts and sciences and strong foundational disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, which align well with Nankai University's Physics Category enrollment in Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) and Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data, Physics and Optoelectronics). The popularity of related majors supports application willingness. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui general college entrance examination is 451,000 (total only), a slight decrease from 462,179 in 2025 (320,779 in Physics Category + 141,400 in History Category), slightly reducing competition pressure. The provincial control line for the Physics Category undergraduate batch dropped from 465 in 2024 to 461 in 2025, a slight decrease. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, with a stable enrollment scale in Anhui (over 80 students in Physics Category), and is not a local university, so regional preference factors are neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the accelerating backward shift in rankings over the past two years, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (2 students), negative reputation events, and sustained popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that competition in the Physics Category in 2026 will still intensify but at a reduced rate. Combining the inertia of ranking backward shift and the reputation suppression effect, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3900, with a range of 3455–4345.

- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics, Data Science)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (including Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering).

- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) (including Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Internet of Things Engineering, Automation, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Material Science) (including Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Biological Science, Materials Physics, Materials Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)

- Science Experimental Class (Digital Economy and Finance) (including Digital Economy, Financial Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3455–4345, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology), with Tier 1 Excellence Top Talent Plan Boling Class as a reach, and Tier 3 Future Industry Elite and Digital Economy and Finance as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3455), focus on reaching for Tier 1 Boling Class and Mathematics and Big Data and other flagship majors.
